items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Quick story from the Fever's win over the Aces: www.circlecityspin.com/fever-aces-f...

media.title: Fever crush Aces after a week of practice times: Likes and Dislikes
media.description: The Fever were finally back in action on Sunday night.

items.title: Fever held the Aces to 68 points, a season-low allowed. Just 27 of them came in the second half. Fever's week off ended up giving them a legs advantage, and they rode it to a win. They're 12-8 now.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Fever held the Aces to 68 points, a season-low allowed. Just 27 of them came in the second half. Fever's week off ended up giving them a legs advantage, and they rode it to a win. They're 12-8 now.

Kelsey Mitchell with 27. Aliyah Boston with 18 and 10 boards.

items.title: 26-14 third quarter in favor of the Fever. We'll see if this holds, but that quarter felt like one team had a week off between games and the other played in OT two nights ago. Fever defense has heightened up and they have just four turnovers.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Pau Gasol. Spanish big was drafted by 3rd by MEM in 01. Was immediate starter & won ROY. Became regular all-star & was best player on 1st good MEM squads. Traded to LAL in 08, helped Kobe to 2 titles. Also great in int'l play. Now a HOFer.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Pau Gasol. Spanish big was drafted by 3rd by MEM in 01. Was immediate starter & won ROY. Became regular all-star & was best player on 1st good MEM squads. Traded to LAL in 08, helped Kobe to 2 titles. Also great in int'l play. Now a HOFer.

items.body_excerpt:
Lexie Hull's jumper just beats the buzzer, giving the Fever a 42-41 lead at the half.

Both teams shooting 45% and the Fever did a good job taking care of the ball and not allowing any second-chance points. Mitchell has 12pts

items.title: Lexie Hull at the horn and the Fever lead 42-41 at the break. Biggest lead was 6 for either team, so always within two possessions. Fun half. Mitchell and Boston combined for 19 of the Fever's 42.
items.author: Tony East

items.title: Sophie Cunningham said during a mid-game broadcast interview that she thinks the Fever's ball movement could be better. I agree, yet so far Boston + Mitchell have been able to keep the offense going at a good-enough level with individual play. They have about half of Fever points
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Sophie Cunningham said during a mid-game broadcast interview that she thinks the Fever's ball movement could be better. I agree, yet so far Boston + Mitchell have been able to keep the offense going at a good-enough level with individual play. They have about half of Fever points.
